title: Luckyland Reprise
lyrics: Oh, no coin in your pocket No coin in your pocket Here's the thing you can do Follow my advice Get to your computer, your tablet, your phone www.advice.com Get free spins, daily steam sticks Cash prices, cash prices Equals big checks, man, we got that You can be the next thing, baby Now you don't have to do that When everything is going wrong, sit there When everything is going wrong, you're sitting there Hey, with no coin in your pocket No bill in your wallet You're sitting there next to your girlfriend Sorry, boo, what we gonna do? You got anyone giving cash prices? Well, maybe I do, like I said Get to your computer, your tablet, your phone www.luckylapsos.com You can be the next big thing, man Now you don't have to borrow From her, she's loving you And you're a winner Yeah, girls are loving you Hey, get your boy, they're loving you too Hey, everybody singing, dancing on the ceiling That's what Lucky Land can do, that's what Lucky Land can do Lucky Land, top 10 checks, no small checks Any size of checks, Lucky Land will take you there Even if you don't get anything There's nothing in your pocket, no way to invest You can still be there, guess what? Lucky Land's next Hey, no coin in my pocket No bills in your wallet I know it's true, what you gonna do? Come with me and fund the band Get down to Lucky Land Come with me to fund the band Get you down to Lucky Land No purchase necessary, all the rules apply You should read the fine print, man, it's true No purchase necessary, all the rules apply You should read the fine print, man, it's true Come down to Lucky Land Come down to Lucky Land Down to Lucky Land Free spins daily, get that shakin' You could be the next one with those Big checks, big checks, big checks, big checks Like me, you got the big checks, big checks, big checks No purchase necessary, no purchase necessary Those are the best words you ever heard Come down to Lucky Land And put those cash prizes in your hand Come down to Lucky Land Got those cash prizes in your hand Do it! Come down to Lucky Land We got those cash prizes in your hand Put it! No purchase, got the cash prizes No one worth it Pure feeling like me Come win at Lucky Land If you smart, you do like Brian do And go pick up your big check
